Name: Shoulder Shrug
Instructions: Sit straight and raise shoulders toward ears and hold for 3 seconds

Name: Hand and Wrist Stretch
Instructions: Place palms together and push left hand against right and hold for 3 seconds
Safety Notes: Stop if experiencing sharp wrist pain

Name: Seated Marching
Instructions: While seated lift one knee as if marching and hold for 2 seconds
Safety Notes: Ensure chair is stable and has a backrest

Name: Towel Slide
Instructions: Place towel under hand on table and slide forward and back with control
Safety Notes: Do not force the stretch beyond comfort

Name: Sit-to-Stand
Instructions: Rise from a seated position to standing using even weight on both legs
Safety Notes: Use armrests for support if balance is unstable

Name: Finger Tapping
Instructions: Tap each finger against the thumb in a sequence from index to pinky

Name: Wall Push-ups
Instructions: Stand facing wall and place palms on wall and lean in and push away

Name: Squeeze Ball
Instructions: Hold ball in affected hand and squeeze as hard as possible for 5 seconds

Name: Heel-to-Toe Stand
Instructions: Stand with one foot directly in front of the other in tandem and hold balance
Safety Notes: Always perform near a grab bar or counter

Name: Single Leg Stance
Instructions: Lift one leg and stand on the other and hold for as long as possible
Safety Notes: Avoid if recent fall history exists without a carer

Name: Facial Muscle Exercises
Instructions: Smile widely and hold for 3 seconds. Purse lips and hold for 3 seconds. Raise eyebrows and hold for 3 seconds
Safety Notes: Avoid if facial pain is present

Name: Cheek Puffing
Instructions: Puff out cheeks and hold for 3 seconds then release slowly
Safety Notes: Ensure mouth is closed during exercise

Name: Tongue Exercises
Instructions: Stick tongue out and hold for 3 seconds. Move tongue side to side slowly

Name: Lip Rounding
Instructions: Round lips as if saying O and hold for 3 seconds. Then stretch lips as if saying E

Name: Speech Repetition
Instructions: Repeat simple words slowly ba-ba-ba pa-pa-pa ta-ta-ta for 1 minute each
Safety Notes: Speak clearly and at comfortable pace

Name: Counting Exercise
Instructions: Count from 1 to 10 slowly and clearly and repeat 3 times

Name: Swallowing Exercise
Instructions: Swallow saliva slowly and deliberately and practice dry swallows 5 times

Name: Neck Stretches
Instructions: Gently tilt head toward each shoulder and hold for 15 seconds each side
Safety Notes: Do not force stretching beyond comfort

Name: Eye Tracking
Instructions: Follow a moving object with eyes only without head movement in all directions

Name: Visual Scanning
Instructions: Scan room systematically from left to right and identify objects

Name: Attention Focus
Instructions: Focus on a single object for 1 minute without distraction and increase duration gradually

Name: Memory Recall
Instructions: Recall 5 items from a list after 1 minute and gradually increase number of items

Name: Puzzle Solving
Instructions: Complete simple jigsaw puzzles or word searches appropriate to ability level

Name: Reading Exercise
Instructions: Read aloud simple sentences or short passages and focus on comprehension
Safety Notes: Use large print materials if needed

Name: Emotional Expression
Instructions: Practice expressing emotions through facial expressions and controlled breathing

Name: Deep Breathing
Instructions: Inhale slowly for 4 counts and hold for 4 counts and exhale for 4 counts

Name: Relaxation Technique
Instructions: Tense and release muscle groups progressively from toes to head

Name: Guided Imagery
Instructions: Visualize calm peaceful scenes while practicing slow breathing

Name: Knee Lifts
Instructions: Sit in chair and lift one knee up toward chest and hold for 2 seconds and lower slowly

Name: Heel Slides
Instructions: Lie on back and slide heel toward buttock and hold for 2 seconds and slide back

Name: Glute Squeezes
Instructions: Squeeze buttock muscles and hold for 5 seconds and release

Name: Calf Raises
Instructions: Stand facing counter and rise up on toes and hold for 2 seconds and lower down

Name: Step-Ups
Instructions: Step up onto low step with one leg and step down and alternate legs

Name: Tandem Walking
Instructions: Walk in straight line placing one foot directly in front of other

Name: Sit and Reach
Instructions: Sit in chair and reach toward toes and hold for 15 seconds and return to start
Safety Notes: Do not bounce or force stretch

Name: Hip Flexor Stretch
Instructions: Sit in chair and pull one knee toward chest and hold for 15 seconds each leg

Name: Arm Circles
Instructions: Extend arms out to sides and make small circles forward for 30 seconds and reverse

Name: Bicep Curls
Instructions: Hold weight and bend elbow bringing weight toward shoulder and lower slowly

Name: Tricep Extensions
Instructions: Hold weight overhead and bend elbow lowering weight behind head and extend back up

Name: Wrist Flexion
Instructions: Hold weight with palm up and bend wrist upward and lower slowly

Name: Pronation Supination
Instructions: Hold weight with arm bent and rotate forearm palm up then palm down

Name: Shoulder Abduction
Instructions: Hold weights at sides and raise arms out to sides to shoulder height and lower

Name: Shoulder Flexion
Instructions: Hold weights at sides and raise arms forward to shoulder height and lower slowly

Name: Seated Marching Advanced
Instructions: Sit in chair and lift knees alternately higher than basic version and maintain rhythm

Name: Standing Balance
Instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart and maintain balance without holding counter

Name: Gait Training
Instructions: Walk with assistive device focusing on even weight distribution and smooth gait

Name: Stair Training
Instructions: Practice going up and down stairs with handrail and one step at a time

Name: Coordination Drill
Instructions: Touch nose with finger and then touch examiners finger at arms length and alternate

Name: Rapid Alternating
Instructions: Tap knees alternately with hands as quickly as possible while maintaining control

Name: Cross Body Reach
Instructions: Reach right hand across body to touch left shoulder and alternate sides
